assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with kubectl get nodes, cluster health verification, and current state documentation

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=us-west1-b' command to check available upgrade versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 9 includes 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat' command to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 4 provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade [CLUSTER_NAME] --master --cluster-version=1.33.X-gke.Y --zone=us-west1-b'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 4 includes verification with kubectl version --short and gcloud describe commands to check currentMasterVersion

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 5 and 6 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools with --node-pool and --cluster-version flags

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Both node pool upgrade steps include 'watch kubectl get nodes' and pod monitoring commands to track progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows sequential upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33, with control plane first then node pools using the same target version

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with node version checks, pod health verification, and kube-system pod checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes both troubleshooting commands section and rollback plan with specific gcloud commands for node pool rollback
